top_tweets.text:
SOMEONE BUILT A SINGLE CLAUDE.MD FILE THAT FIXES EVERY BAD HABIT CLAUDE CODE HAS AND IT HIT 78.5K STARS

it's based on andrej karpathy's public observations about how LLMs write code

the problem he pointed out is that claude makes silent assumptions, overcomplicates everything, https://t.co/FnGV9q1TQ7
top_tweets.author: om_patel5
top_tweets.name: Om Patel
top_tweets.summary_zh: 有人根據 Andrej Karpathy 對 LLM 編碼習慣的觀察，建立了一個 Claude.md 檔案來修正 Claude Code 的壞習慣（如隱含假設、過度複雜化），該專案已獲得 78.5K 星標。這顯示透過良好的 prompt 設計可大幅改善 AI 編碼輸出品質。

top_tweets.text:
GPT-5.5 is now available in Cursor!

It's currently the top model on CursorBench at 72.8%.

We've partnered with OpenAI to offer it for 50% off through May 2.
top_tweets.author: cursor_ai
top_tweets.name: Cursor
top_tweets.summary_zh: Cursor 現已支援 GPT-5.5，在 CursorBench 達到 72.8% 成績成為榜首，並與 OpenAI 合作提供五折優惠至 5 月 2 日。這為產品團隊提供更強大的 AI coding 選項。

top_tweets.text:
This is where we are right now. And i’m not gonna lie it feels pretty magical 🧚‍♀️

Qwen3.6 27B running inside of Pi coding agent via Llama.cpp on the MacBook Pro

For non-trivial tasks on the @huggingface  codebases, this feels very, very close to hitting the latest Opus in Claude https://t.co/lsIxLoUneU
top_tweets.author: julien_c
top_tweets.name: Julien Chaumond
top_tweets.summary_zh: Qwen3.6 27B 透過 Llama.cpp 在 MacBook Pro 本地運行，於 Pi coding agent 中處理 Hugging Face 程式碼庫的非平凡任務時，表現已非常接近 Claude 最新的 Opus。顯示本地模型正快速追上雲端最強模型。

top_tweets.text: I recorded a 43-min video on how to turn a DESIGN.md into landing pages, mobile screens and motion design https://t.co/f4YMefoQH8
top_tweets.author: MengTo
top_tweets.name: Meng To
top_tweets.summary_zh: 作者錄製了 43 分鐘影片示範如何從 DESIGN.md 文件生成 landing page、手機介面及動態設計，展示設計到實作的工作流程整合。

top_tweets.text:
Andrej Karpathy (@karpathy), OpenAI co-founder, ex-Tesla AI, "vibe coding" creator.

In just 4 mins, he explains why Claude Skills, MCP servers, and AI agents are past the hype and are now the new baseline for building.

Worth every second ↓ https://t.co/Ef0oDov90g
top_tweets.author: DataChaz
top_tweets.name: Charly Wargnier
top_tweets.summary_zh: Andrej Karpathy（OpenAI 共同創辦人、前 Tesla AI 負責人、「vibe coding」創造者）在 4 分鐘內解釋為何 Claude Skills、MCP servers 和 AI agents 已超越炒作階段，成為開發的新基準線。

top_tweets.text:
> be chinese ai labs
> while claude and openai are in cold war
> kimi dropped k2.6 using deepseek's v3 architecture
> the same week deepseek drops v4 using kimi's muon optimizer
> 1.6 trillion parameters & 1M context
> both match or beat closed models on benchmarks while being 8x https://t.co/0c8JXMgF3j
top_tweets.author: cgtwts
top_tweets.name: CG
top_tweets.summary_zh: 中國 AI 實驗室協同進展：Kimi 發布採用 DeepSeek v3 架構的 k2.6，同週 DeepSeek 用 Kimi 的 Muon optimizer 推出 v4（1.6 兆參數、1M context），兩者在 benchmark 上匹敵或超越閉源模型，成本卻低 8 倍。

top_tweets.text: Dumbest design mistake in Apple history is folding “find on page” in Safari under “Share.” It is 3 clicks deep and makes no sense.
top_tweets.author: amasad
top_tweets.name: Amjad Masad
top_tweets.summary_zh: 作者批評 Apple 將 Safari「頁面內搜尋」功能藏在「分享」選單深處（需點三次）是史上最愚蠢的設計決策，毫無邏輯可言。這突顯資訊架構對使用體驗的關鍵影響。

top_tweets.text:

top_tweets.summary_zh: Microsoft 在官網上用新 Xbox 標誌設計系統性更新了所有世代主機的 logo（Series X/S、Xbox One、360、OG Xbox），展現品牌設計語言的一致性演進。

Windows XP Shutdown Screen
vs.
Windows Vista Shutdown Screen https://t.co/p8EqrU63pu
top_tweets.author: WebDesignMuseum
top_tweets.name: Web Design Museum
top_tweets.summary_zh: Windows XP 與 Vista 關機畫面的設計對比，引發對不同世代作業系統介面設計演進的討論。

top_tweets.text: if a company uses ai to promote their product i’m just gonna assume it’s low quality garbage
top_tweets.author: perplexexpress
top_tweets.name: bONGO • LIVING THE DREAM 🏝️
top_tweets.summary_zh: 針對 Colgate（660 億美元公司）使用 AI 生成廣告素材，原推主直言若公司用 AI 宣傳產品，會直接認定該產品是低品質垃圾。反映市場對 AI 生成內容品質的不信任。

context.quoted_text: I am genuinely in shock. @Colgate is a $66 billion company. https://t.co/MuWJPWUmBb

top_tweets.text:
After Google won search, “google” became a verb.

It’ll be interesting to see which AI lab turns its product into a verb first!
top_tweets.author: maddiedreese
top_tweets.name: Maddie D. Reese
top_tweets.summary_zh: 作者提出有趣觀察：Google 贏得搜尋後，「google」成為動詞；接下來值得關注哪家 AI 實驗室的產品會率先變成動詞。這反映產品滲透文化的終極指標。

top_tweets.author: gdb
top_tweets.name: Greg Brockman
top_tweets.summary_zh: 簡短但高讚肯定：OpenAI 團隊交付能力強（ships fast）。對產品團隊而言，執行速度是關鍵競爭力。

criteria.score_formula: likes（主要）+ Claude 人工過濾廣告/招聘/meme/非設計
claude_filter_rules: 排除純廣告、招聘文（有洞見的 JD 除外）
排除與產品設計/PM 無關（crypto、體育、政治等）
排除 meme/搞笑但無內容
偏好有觀點的原創內容

top_products.title: Grok Voice Think Fast 1.0
top_products.author: Ankit Sharma
top_products.tagline: Our most capable voice agent is now available via API
top_products.summary_zh: xAI 推出的語音代理服務，現已開放 API 供開發者整合使用。適合需要在應用中加入語音對話功能的開發團隊。

top_products.title: TuneJourney.com
top_products.author: Binary
top_products.tagline: AI learns your listening habits and curates your live radio
top_products.summary_zh: 透過 AI 學習用戶的收聽習慣，自動策劃個人化的線上電台內容。適合想要發掘新音樂但不想手動選歌的聽眾。

top_products.title: DeepSeek-V4
top_products.author: Zac Zuo
top_products.tagline: The open-source era of 1M context intelligence
top_products.summary_zh: 開源 AI 模型，支援 100 萬 token 的上下文處理能力。適合需要處理大量文本或長篇文件的開發者與研究人員。

top_products.title: Tyndale
top_products.author: Pedro Mendes
top_products.tagline: Translate your app with the AI you already pay for
top_products.summary_zh: 利用用戶現有的 AI 服務訂閱來翻譯應用程式內容，無需額外付費給翻譯工具。適合已使用 OpenAI 等服務的開發團隊。
